planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].title.sw: Picks za bure za kila siku

planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.nl: Krijg elke ochtend onze top 3 value-picks, handmatig geselecteerd en beoordeeld door onze modellen.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.de: Erhalte jeden Morgen unsere Top-3-Value-Picks, handverlesen und von unseren Modellen bewertet.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.fr: Recevez chaque matin nos 3 meilleurs value picks, sélectionnés à la main et notés par nos modèles.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.es: Recibe cada mañana nuestros 3 mejores value picks, seleccionados a mano y evaluados por nuestros modelos.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.it: Ricevi ogni mattina i nostri top 3 value pick, selezionati a mano e valutati dai nostri modelli.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.sw: Pata picks 3 bora za value kila asubuhi, zilizochaguliwa kwa mkono na kutathminiwa na modeli zetu.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.id: Dapatkan top 3 value picks kami setiap pagi, dipilih secara manual dan dinilai oleh model kami.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.pt: Recebe todas as manhãs as nossas top 3 value picks, selecionadas à mão e graduadas pelos nossos modelos.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.tr: Her sabah modellerimiz tarafından elle seçilmiş ve notlandırılmış en iyi 3 value picks'imizi alın.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.pl: Otrzymuj każdego ranka nasze top 3 value picks, ręcznie wybrane i ocenione przez nasze modele.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.ro: Primește în fiecare dimineață top 3 value picks ale noastre, selectate manual și evaluate de modelele noastre.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.ru: Получай каждое утро наши топ-3 value picks, отобранные вручную и оценённые нашими моделями.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.el: Λάβε κάθε πρωί τα top 3 value picks μας, χειροποίητα επιλεγμένα και βαθμολογημένα από τα μοντέλα μας.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.da: Få hver morgen vores top 3 value picks, håndplukkede og vurderet af vores modeller.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf1].body.sv: Få varje morgon våra topp 3-värdetips, handplockade och bedömda av våra modeller.

planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.nl: Sluit je aan bij duizenden members die in realtime picks bespreken en inzichten uitwisselen.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.de: Schließe dich Tausenden von Mitgliedern an, die in Echtzeit Picks diskutieren und Insights austauschen.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.fr: Rejoins des milliers de membres qui discutent des picks et échangent des insights en temps réel.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.es: Únete a miles de miembros que discuten picks e intercambian insights en tiempo real.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.it: Unisciti a migliaia di membri che discutono di pick e si scambiano insights in tempo reale.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.sw: Jiunge na maelfu ya members wanaojadili picks na kubadilishana insights kwa wakati halisi.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.id: Bergabunglah dengan ribuan anggota yang membahas pick dan bertukar insight secara real time.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.pt: Junta-te a milhares de membros que discutem picks e trocam insights em tempo real.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.tr: Gerçek zamanlı olarak picks tartışan ve insights değişen binlerce üyeye katılın.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.pl: Dołącz do tysięcy członków dyskutujących picki i wymieniających się insightami w czasie rzeczywistym.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.ro: Alătură-te miilor de membri care discută pick-uri și schimbă insights în timp real.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.ru: Присоединяйся к тысячам участников, обсуждающих picks и обменивающихся insights в реальном времени.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.el: Γίνε μέλος χιλιάδων μελών που συζητούν picks και ανταλλάσσουν insights σε πραγματικό χρόνο.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.da: Bliv en del af tusindvis af medlemmer, der diskuterer picks og udveksler indsigter i realtid.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf2].body.sv: Gå med tusentals medlemmar som diskuterar tips och utbyter insikter i realtid.

planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.nl: Een strakke samenvatting van de ROI van afgelopen week, hit rate en beste segmenten - rechtstreeks in je inbox.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.de: Eine klare Zusammenfassung der ROI der letzten Woche, Trefferquote und besten Segmente - direkt in deinen Posteingang.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.fr: Un résumé clair du ROI de la semaine dernière, du taux de réussite et des meilleurs segments - directement dans ta boîte de réception.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.es: Un resumen claro del ROI de la semana pasada, tasa de acierto y mejores segmentos - directo a tu bandeja de entrada.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.it: Un riassunto pulito di ROI, hit rate e migliori segmenti della settimana scorsa - direttamente nella tua inbox.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.sw: Muhtasari safi wa ROI ya wiki iliyopita, hit rate na segments bora - moja kwa moja kwa inbox yako.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.id: Ringkasan jelas ROI minggu lalu, hit rate, dan segmen terbaik - langsung ke inbox Anda.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.pt: Um resumo claro do ROI da semana passada, hit rate e melhores segmentos - directo para a tua caixa de entrada.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.tr: Geçen haftanın ROI'sinin, hit rate'inin ve en iyi segmentlerinin temiz bir özeti - doğrudan gelen kutunuza.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.pl: Czytelne podsumowanie zeszłotygodniowego ROI, hit rate i najlepszych segmentów - prosto do twojej skrzynki.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.ro: Un rezumat clar al ROI-ului săptămânii trecute, al hit rate-ului și al celor mai bune segmente - direct în inbox-ul tău.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.ru: Чёткое резюме ROI прошлой недели, hit rate и лучших сегментов — прямо в твой inbox.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.el: Μια καθαρή σύνοψη του ROI της περασμένης εβδομάδας, του hit rate και των καλύτερων segments - απευθείας στο inbox σου.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.da: En ren opsummering af sidste uges ROI, hit-rate og bedste segmenter - direkte i din indbakke.
planFeatures[bronze].features[bf3].body.sv: En ren sammanfattning av förra veckans ROI, träffprocent och bästa segment - direkt i din inkorg.

planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.nl: Onbeperkte toegang tot elke tip, over elke competitie - meerdere keren per dag bijgewerkt.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.de: Unbegrenzter Zugriff auf jeden Tipp, über alle Ligen - mehrmals täglich aktualisiert.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.fr: Accès illimité à chaque tip, dans chaque ligue - mis à jour plusieurs fois par jour.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.es: Acceso ilimitado a cada tip, en cada liga - actualizado varias veces al día.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.it: Accesso illimitato a ogni tip, in ogni lega - aggiornato più volte al giorno.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.sw: Ufikiaji usio na kikomo kwa kila tip, kwa kila ligi - iliyosasishwa mara kadhaa kwa siku.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.id: Akses tak terbatas ke setiap tip, di setiap liga - diperbarui beberapa kali per hari.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.pt: Acesso ilimitado a cada tip, em cada liga - atualizado várias vezes por dia.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.tr: Her lig için her tip'e sınırsız erişim - günde birkaç kez güncellenir.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.pl: Nielimitowany dostęp do każdego typu, w każdej lidze - aktualizowany kilka razy dziennie.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.ro: Acces nelimitat la fiecare pont, în fiecare ligă - actualizat de mai multe ori pe zi.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.ru: Неограниченный доступ к каждому тип у в каждой лиге — обновляется несколько раз в день.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.el: Απεριόριστη πρόσβαση σε κάθε tip, σε κάθε λίγκα - ενημερώνεται πολλές φορές την ημέρα.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.da: Ubegrænset adgang til hvert tip, på tværs af hver liga - opdateret flere gange om dagen.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf1].body.sv: Obegränsad åtkomst till varje tips i varje liga - uppdateras flera gånger per dag.

planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.nl: Volg je winstcurve, bankroll en per-competitie prestaties met pro-grade analytics.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.de: Verfolge deine Gewinnkurve, Bankroll und liga-spezifische Leistung mit Pro-Grade-Analytics.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.fr: Suis ta courbe de profit, ta bankroll et ta performance par ligue avec des analytics pro-grade.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.es: Sigue tu curva de beneficios, bankroll y rendimiento por liga con analytics pro-grade.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.it: Monitora la tua curva di profitto, bankroll e performance per lega con analytics pro-grade.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.sw: Fuatilia curve yako ya faida, bankroll na utendaji kwa kila ligi na analytics ya pro-grade.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.id: Lacak kurva profit, bankroll, dan performa per liga Anda dengan analytics pro-grade.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.pt: Segue a tua curva de lucro, bankroll e desempenho por liga com analytics pro-grade.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.tr: Kar eğrinizi, bankroll'unuzu ve lig başına performansınızı pro-grade analytics ile takip edin.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.pl: Śledź swoją krzywą zysków, bankroll i wyniki per liga z pro-grade analytics.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.ro: Urmărește-ți curba de profit, bankroll-ul și performanța pe ligă cu analytics pro-grade.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.ru: Отслеживай свою кривую прибыли, bankroll и per-league производительность с pro-grade analytics.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.el: Παρακολούθησε την καμπύλη κέρδους σου, το bankroll και την απόδοση ανά λίγκα με pro-grade analytics.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.da: Følg din profitkurve, bankroll og pr.-liga-præstation med pro-grade analytics.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf2].body.sv: Följ din vinstkurva, bankroll och prestation per liga med pro-grade analytics.

planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.nl: Krijg een melding zodra een pick met +EV binnenkomt zodat je de beste odds kunt vastzetten.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.de: Erhalte eine Benachrichtigung, sobald ein Pick mit +EV erscheint, damit du die besten Odds sichern kannst.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.fr: Sois alerté dès qu'un pick avec +EV tombe pour verrouiller les meilleures cotes.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.es: Recibe una alerta en cuanto aparezca un pick con +EV para fijar las mejores cuotas.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.it: Ricevi una notifica nel momento in cui arriva un pick con +EV così puoi fissare le quote migliori.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.sw: Pokea arifa wakati pick yenye +EV inapotokea ili uweze kufunga odds bora.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.id: Dapatkan notifikasi begitu pick dengan +EV muncul agar bisa mengunci odds terbaik.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.pt: Sê notificado no momento em que uma pick com +EV cai para fixares as melhores odds.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.tr: +EV'li bir pick düştüğü anda bildirim alın, böylece en iyi oranları yakalayın.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.pl: Otrzymuj powiadomienie w chwili, gdy pojawi się pick z +EV, aby zabezpieczyć najlepsze kursy.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.ro: Fii notificat în momentul în care apare un pick cu +EV pentru a prinde cele mai bune cote.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.ru: Получай уведомление в момент, когда появляется pick с +EV, чтобы зафиксировать лучшие odds.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.el: Ειδοποιήσου τη στιγμή που ένα pick με +EV ρίχνεται για να κλειδώσεις τις καλύτερες αποδόσεις.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.da: Bliv notificeret i det øjeblik et pick med +EV lander, så du kan låse de bedste odds.
planFeatures[silver].features[sf3].body.sv: Få en avisering så fort ett tips med +EV kommer så du kan låsa de bästa oddsen.

planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.nl: Onze picks met de hoogste confidence - kleinere lijst, grotere edge. Elke pick is model-backed.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.de: Unsere Picks mit der höchsten Konfidenz - kleinere Liste, größere Edge. Jeder Pick ist modellgestützt.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.fr: Nos picks avec la confiance la plus élevée - liste plus petite, edge plus grand. Chaque pick est soutenu par le modèle.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.es: Nuestros picks con mayor confianza - lista más pequeña, edge mayor. Cada pick está respaldado por el modelo.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.it: I nostri pick con la confidence più alta - lista più piccola, edge più grande. Ogni pick è supportato dal modello.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.sw: Picks zetu zenye confidence ya juu zaidi - orodha ndogo, edge kubwa. Kila pick inaungwa mkono na modeli.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.id: Picks dengan confidence tertinggi - daftar lebih kecil, edge lebih besar. Setiap pick didukung model.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.pt: As nossas picks de maior confiança - lista menor, edge maior. Cada pick é suportada pelo modelo.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.tr: En yüksek confidence'lı picks'imiz - daha küçük liste, daha büyük edge. Her pick model destekli.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.pl: Nasze picki o najwyższej pewności - mniejsza lista, większa edge. Każdy pick poparty modelem.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.ro: Pick-urile noastre cu cea mai mare încredere - listă mai mică, edge mai mare. Fiecare pick este susținut de model.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.ru: Наши picks с наивысшей confidence — меньше в списке, больше edge. Каждый pick подкреплён моделью.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.el: Τα picks μας με την υψηλότερη confidence - μικρότερη λίστα, μεγαλύτερο edge. Κάθε pick υποστηρίζεται από μοντέλο.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.da: Vores picks med højeste confidence - mindre liste, større edge. Hvert pick er modelunderbygget.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf1].body.sv: Våra tips med högst konfidens - mindre lista, större edge. Varje tips är modellstött.

planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.nl: Diepe kalibratie, segment-ROI, bankroll-planning en backtests. Geen feature op slot.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.de: Tiefe Kalibrierung, Segment-ROI, Bankroll-Planung und Backtests. Keine Funktion gesperrt.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.fr: Calibrage approfondi, ROI par segment, planification de bankroll et backtests. Aucune fonctionnalité verrouillée.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.es: Calibración profunda, ROI por segmento, planificación de bankroll y backtests. Ninguna función bloqueada.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.it: Calibrazione profonda, ROI per segmento, pianificazione bankroll e backtest. Nessuna feature bloccata.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.sw: Kalibrasho ya kina, ROI ya segment, kupanga bankroll na backtests. Hakuna feature iliyofungwa.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.id: Kalibrasi mendalam, ROI segmen, perencanaan bankroll, dan backtests. Tidak ada fitur yang dikunci.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.pt: Calibração profunda, ROI por segmento, planeamento de bankroll e backtests. Nenhuma feature bloqueada.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.tr: Derin kalibrasyon, segment ROI, bankroll planlama ve backtests. Kilitli özellik yok.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.pl: Głęboka kalibracja, ROI per segment, planowanie bankrolla i backtesty. Żadna funkcja nie zablokowana.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.ro: Calibrare profundă, ROI pe segment, planificare bankroll și backtests. Nicio funcționalitate blocată.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.ru: Глубокая калибровка, segment-ROI, планирование bankroll и backtests. Ничего не заблокировано.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.el: Βαθιά καλιμπράρισμα, ROI ανά τμήμα, σχεδιασμός bankroll και backtests. Κανένα feature κλειδωμένο.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.da: Dybdekalibrering, segment-ROI, bankroll-planlægning og backtests. Ingen funktion låst.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf2].body.sv: Djup kalibrering, segment-ROI, bankroll-planering och backtests. Ingen funktion låst.

planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.nl: Directe lijn naar het team, plus early access tot nieuwe modellen en betting tools.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.de: Direkter Draht zum Team, plus Early Access zu neuen Modellen und Betting-Tools.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.fr: Ligne directe avec l'équipe, plus early access aux nouveaux modèles et outils de betting.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.es: Línea directa con el equipo, más early access a nuevos modelos y herramientas de betting.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.it: Linea diretta con il team, più early access a nuovi modelli e strumenti di betting.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.sw: Mstari wa moja kwa moja kwa timu, pamoja na early access kwa modeli mpya na zana za betting.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.id: Jalur langsung ke tim, plus early access ke model baru dan alat betting.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.pt: Linha directa com a equipa, mais early access a novos modelos e ferramentas de betting.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.tr: Ekibe doğrudan hat, artı yeni modellere ve betting araçlarına early access.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.pl: Bezpośredni kontakt z zespołem plus early access do nowych modeli i narzędzi betting.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.ro: Linie directă cu echipa, plus acces timpuriu la noi modele și instrumente de betting.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.ru: Прямая линия с командой плюс early access к новым моделям и betting-инструментам.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.el: Άμεση γραμμή με την ομάδα, συν early access σε νέα μοντέλα και εργαλεία betting.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.da: Direkte linje til teamet, plus early access til nye modeller og betting-værktøjer.
planFeatures[gold].features[gf3].body.sv: Direkt linje till teamet plus early access till nya modeller och bettingverktyg.

planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.nl: Betaal één keer, win voor altijd. Elke huidige en toekomstige BetsPlug-feature inbegrepen, altijd.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.de: Einmal zahlen, für immer gewinnen. Jede aktuelle und zukünftige BetsPlug-Funktion enthalten, immer.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.fr: Paie une fois, gagne pour toujours. Chaque fonctionnalité BetsPlug actuelle et future incluse, toujours.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.es: Paga una vez, gana para siempre. Cada feature actual y futura de BetsPlug incluida, siempre.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.it: Paga una volta, vinci per sempre. Ogni feature BetsPlug attuale e futura inclusa, sempre.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.sw: Lipa mara moja, shinda milele. Kila feature ya sasa na ijayo ya BetsPlug imejumuishwa, kila wakati.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.id: Bayar sekali, menang selamanya. Setiap fitur BetsPlug saat ini dan masa depan disertakan, selalu.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.pt: Paga uma vez, ganha para sempre. Cada feature actual e futura da BetsPlug incluída, sempre.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.tr: Bir kez öde, sonsuza kadar kazan. Tüm mevcut ve gelecekteki BetsPlug özellikleri dahil, her zaman.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.pl: Zapłać raz, wygrywaj zawsze. Każda obecna i przyszła funkcja BetsPlug w cenie, zawsze.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.ro: Plătește o dată, câștigă pentru totdeauna. Fiecare funcție curentă și viitoare BetsPlug inclusă, mereu.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.ru: Заплати один раз — выигрывай всегда. Каждая текущая и будущая BetsPlug-функция включена, всегда.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.el: Πλήρωσε μία φορά, κέρδισε για πάντα. Κάθε τρέχον και μελλοντικό feature BetsPlug περιλαμβάνεται, πάντα.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.da: Betal én gang, vind for evigt. Hver nuværende og fremtidig BetsPlug-funktion inkluderet, altid.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf1].bod.sv: Betala en gång, vinn för alltid. Varje nuvarande och framtida BetsPlug-funktion ingår, alltid.

planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.nl: Telegram-alerts, Tip van de Dag, premium reports - niets te upgraden, ooit.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.de: Telegram-Alerts, Tipp des Tages, Premium-Reports - nichts zu upgraden, jemals.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.fr: Alertes Telegram, Tip du Jour, rapports premium - rien à upgrader, jamais.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.es: Alertas de Telegram, Tip del Día, reports premium - nada que actualizar, nunca.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.it: Alert Telegram, Tip del Giorno, report premium - nulla da aggiornare, mai.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.sw: Arifa za Telegram, Tip ya Siku, reports za premium - hakuna cha kupandisha, kamwe.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.id: Alert Telegram, Tip Hari Ini, laporan premium - tidak ada yang perlu di-upgrade, selamanya.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.pt: Alertas Telegram, Dica do Dia, relatórios premium - nada para fazer upgrade, nunca.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.tr: Telegram uyarıları, Günün İpucu, premium raporlar - asla yükseltilecek bir şey yok.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.pl: Alerty Telegram, Typ Dnia, premium raporty - nic do upgrade'u, nigdy.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.ro: Alerte Telegram, Pontul Zilei, rapoarte premium - nimic de upgradat, niciodată.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.ru: Telegram-уведомления, Совет дня, premium-отчёты — никакого upgrade никогда.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.el: Ειδοποιήσεις Telegram, Συμβουλή της Ημέρας, premium αναφορές - τίποτα προς αναβάθμιση, ποτέ.
planFeatures[platinum].features[pf2].bod.da: Telegram-alarmer, Dagens tip, premium-rapporter - intet at opgradere, nogensinde.
